rawText:
JOHN DOE
Software Engineer
john.doe@email.com | (555) 123-4567 | linkedin.com/in/johndoe

SUMMARY
Senior Software Engineer with 6+ years of experience in full-stack development, specializing in Node.js,TypeScript, and cloud infrastructure. Proven track record of delivering scalable microservices and leading cross-functional teams.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Engineer | TechCorp Inc. | Jan 2021 - Present
• Leddevelopment of payment processing microservice handling 50K+ transactions daily
• Reduced API latency by 40% through Redis caching and query optimization
• Mentored team of 4 junior developers, conducting code reviews andpair programming
• Implemented CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, reducing deployment time by 60%

Software Engineer | StartupXYZ | Mar 2018 - Dec 2020
• Built REST APIs using Express.js and PostgreSQL serving 100K+users
• Developed real-time notification system using WebSockets
• Migrated legacy monolith to microservices architecture on AWS

EDUCATION
B.S. Computer Science | State University | 2017
GPA:3.7/4.0

SKILLS
Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, SQL
Frameworks: Node.js, NestJS, React, Express
Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
Cloud: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS), Docker, Kubernetes
Tools: Git, GitHubActions, Jest, Terraform
